_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting social network analysis, buddy list analysis, and/or cookie analysis.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.427), AB-A-002 (AB, cosine: 0.420).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.442). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, skill]. DCWF-only terms [buddy, conducting, cookie, list, network, social] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.889, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in conducting social network analysis, buddy list analysis, and/or cookie" and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.438 ≈ STS 0.442 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [analysis, skill]. DCWF-only: [buddy, conducting, cookie, list, network, social]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non].
